| **Bunny CDN**                                    | Bunny           | cdn   | paid — Pay-as-go: ~$0.01/GB/month storage + $0.005-0.03/GB egress.      | web1  | active     | proprietary | `render.com/services/bunny-storage-service.js`<br>`render.com/services/file-download-service.js`<br>`cloudflare-worker/modules/handlers/image-proxy-handler.js`                | `BUNNY_CDN_HOSTNAME` `BUNNY_STORAGE_KEY`                                         | —      |
| **Cloudflare Worker (chatomni-proxy)**           | Cloudflare      | infra | freemium — Free tier 100k req/day; paid $5/month for 10M req/month.     | both  | active     | proprietary | `cloudflare-worker/worker.js`<br>`web2/shared/web2-auth.js`<br>`native-orders/js/native-orders-api.js`<br>`render.com/services/web2-msg-send-worker.js`                        | `CF_WORKER_URL` `CF_ACCOUNT_ID` `CF_TOKEN`                                       | —      |
| **Firebase Authentication**                      | Google Firebase | infra | freemium — Spark Free: 50k MAU; $0.0055/MAU above.                      | web1  | active     | proprietary | `shared/js/firebase-config.js`<br>`shared/js/shared-auth-manager.js`<br>`render.com/routes/services-overview.js`                                                               | `FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID` `FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL` `FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY`             | —      |
| **Firebase Firestore**                           | Google Firebase | infra | freemium — Spark Free: 1GB, 50k reads/20k writes/day; pay-as-you-go abo | web1  | dormant    | proprietary | `shared/js/firebase-config.js`<br>`render.com/routes/services-overview.js`                                                                                                     | `FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID` `FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL` `FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY`             | —      |
| **Firebase Storage**                             | Google Firebase | api   | freemium — Spark Free tier; migrated away.                              | web2  | dormant    | proprietary | `render.com/services/firebase-storage-service.js`                                                                                                                              | `FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID`                                                            | —      |
| **GitHub Pages**                                 | GitHub          | infra | free — 100 GB/month bandwidth, 10 builds/hour (free public repo).       | both  | active     | proprietary | `.github/workflows/deploy.yml`<br>`render.com/server.js`                                                                                                                       | —                                                                                | —      |
| **jsDelivr CDN**                                 | jsDelivr        | cdn   | free — Free CDN for npm packages and GitHub repos.                      | both  | active     | —           | `web2/products/js/web2-products-print-barcode.js`<br>`web2/video-maker/js/video-tts.js`<br>`web2/photo-studio/photo-studio-bg.js`<br>`web2/photo-studio/photo-studio-state.js` | —                                                                                | —      |
| **Render Backend (n2store-fallback / web2-api)** | Render          | infra | paid — ~$7/month (Starter) for n2store-fallback; web2-api + web2-re     | both  | active     | proprietary | `render.com/server.js`<br>`render.com/routes/web2-live-relay.js`<br>`live-chat/js/api-config.js`                                                                               | `PORT` `NODE_ENV` `WEB2_API_FORWARD_URL` `WEB2_REALTIME_URL`                     | —      |
| **Render Postgres (Web 1.0)**                    | Render          | infra | paid — ~$19/month (Basic 1GB, Singapore region).                        | web1  | active     | proprietary | `render.com/server.js`<br>`render.com/routes/services-overview.js`                                                                                                             | `DATABASE_URL`                                                                   | —      |
